description: Schema for the target repository list fetched from GitHub API.

columns.name: url
columns.description: Full HTTPS URL of the GitHub repository (e.g., https://github.com/user/repo).

columns.name: primary_language
columns.description: Primary programming language of the repository.

columns.name: stars
columns.description: Number of stars the repository has received.

columns.name: age
columns.description: ISO 8601 formatted date string of the repository creation date.

constraints.filter_criteria: Stars > 1000, Created >= 2015-01-01, Languages in [JavaScript, Python, Java, C++]
